subcodes.first_line: Say: O people of God! Spend your precious life in service to the Cause. In every land must the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو یا حزب الله عمر گرانمایه را در خدمت امر صرف نمائید در هر ارضی باید اولیا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consultation
